name: CortIQ Analytics
description: MCP server for CortIQ — query web analytics data, AI agent traffic, heatmaps, and run AI-visibility audits. The first analytics platform with dedicated tracking for AI agents on the web.

tools.name: track_event
tools.description: Send a tracking event (page view, click, custom event) for a registered site

tools.name: get_analytics
tools.description: Retrieve aggregated analytics for a site: sessions, page views, traffic sources, device breakdown, top pages

tools.name: get_ai_agent_sessions
tools.description: Query AI agent sessions for a site — which agents visited, journey paths, conversion attribution

tools.name: get_heatmap
tools.description: Retrieve click heatmap data for a specific page URL and device type

tools.name: run_geo_audit
tools.description: Run an AI-visibility (GEO) audit on any URL — returns GEO score, llms.txt presence, crawler access, schema markup

authentication.description: API key required. Obtain from Settings → API Keys in the CortIQ dashboard.
